summary: Sprint 9 (SaaS foundation) frontend E2E testing complete — 26/26 checks passed. Path-based multi-tenancy (/t/:slug/*) works end-to-end: root and all guest legacy paths redirect to /t/aura, three seed tenants (aura/bhairavgarh/hillhaven) render with distinct brand colors (#4F46E5 / #7B2C2C / #0F766E via --brand-primary CSS var), brand names, taglines, and template variants. TenantSwitcher opens, lists other 2 tenants, and hot-swaps tenant + theme without reload. 404 unknown-slug page renders with data-testid='tenant-not-found'. Hillhaven navbar correctly omits Spa link (module disabled). Guest auth wall on /t/bhairavgarh/dashboard uses maroon lock icon (rgb(123,44,44)) — themed. Zustand persist works across reload; sign-out re-triggers wall. PMS untouched: /admin/login loads, gm@aurahotels.com logs in, admin console renders with Aura indigo branding, TenantSwitcher is hidden on /admin/*. Cross-tenant nav: Reserve button on /t/bhairavgarh/rooms navigates to /t/bhairavgarh/booking (stays in scope). No QueryClient errors in console. Sprint 8 sidebar Pro-badge reactivity bug from iteration_12 has been fixed in AdminLayout.jsx line 76 (`&& !isPro`).
features_verified: Root '/' redirects to /t/aura; /rooms → /t/aura/rooms (legacy redirects wired for all guest paths).
Aura tenant (luxury): brand-primary=#4F46E5, brand mark 'Aura Hotels', switcher pill shows 'Aura Hotels'.
Bhairavgarh tenant (heritage): brand-primary=#7B2C2C, brand mark 'Bhairavgarh Palace', tagline 'A Rajputana Legend Since 1732'.
Hillhaven tenant (basic): brand-primary=#0F766E, brand mark 'Hill Haven Boutique'. Navbar excludes Spa (module disabled).
TenantSwitcher: toggle opens menu, tenant-option-<slug> visible for other 2 tenants, click navigates and swaps theme live.
/t/nonexistent-slug renders data-testid='tenant-not-found' with 'Property not found' + CTA back to Aura.
Guest auth wall on /t/bhairavgarh/dashboard themed maroon (rgb(123,44,44)) — not indigo.
Guest sign-in via modal, Zustand persists across reload; sign-out via nav-menu-signout clears state and re-shows wall.
Admin login (gm@aurahotels.com) works; /admin/* uses Aura indigo regardless of last-visited tenant; TenantSwitcher hidden on /admin/*.
Cross-tenant navigation: Reserve on /t/bhairavgarh/rooms → /t/bhairavgarh/booking (stays in bhairavgarh scope).
QueryClientProvider mounted at root — no 'QueryClient not found' errors in console.
Zustand persist working via new v2 keys (aura_admin_tier_v2, aura_guest_user_v2).
critical_code_review_comments: Sprint 9 foundation is clean. Note: TenantSwitcher is a preview-only floating pill — should be gated behind an env flag before production so end-guests don't see it.
TenantProvider.jsx 'not_found' branch uses <a href> for CTA which causes a full page reload rather than a client-side <Link>. Minor.
index.css --brand-* CSS vars are set on <html>; on admin routes theme is re-applied to Aura defaults which is correct — verified live.
test_credentials: See /app/memory/test_credentials.md — gm@aurahotels.com / any password for admin; any email + non-empty password for guest.
seed_data_creation: None — all tenant JSON is in tenantRegistry.js.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 9 SaaS foundation is stable. Persist keys renamed to *_v2. Legacy paths (/rooms, /booking, /dashboard, etc.) redirect to /t/aura/*. Admin routes stay Aura-branded (SaaS platform brand). For future tenant-scoped tests, use /t/bhairavgarh (pro tier) or /t/hillhaven (basic tier with spa/events disabled). Sprint 8 sidebar Pro-badge reactivity bug is fixed in AdminLayout.jsx L76.
